case_title: HARTLEY, DOUGLAS L. DBA SILENTRADIO/AUBURN ASSOC. VS TARR & FEATHERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,140.00 FILED BY HARTLEY, DOUGLAS L. DBA SILENTRADIO/AUBURN ASSOC. AS TO DEFENDANT TARR & FEATHERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
